title: CT11 static tactic graph — Localization
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT11 (Localization). It requires the complete 19-node array in fixed source order from CT11.N01 through CT11.N19, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT11 (Localization) tactic specification; must equal "CT11".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N01, "Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N01, "Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N01, "Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N02, "Lemma — admissible decomposition into connected pieces", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N02, "Lemma — admissible decomposition into connected pieces"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N02, "Lemma — admissible decomposition into connected pieces"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N03, "Lemma — admissibility is preserved by local moves?", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N03, "Lemma — admissibility is preserved by local moves?"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N03, "Lemma — admissibility is preserved by local moves?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N04, "Routing theorem — why did admissibility fail?", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N04, "Routing theorem — why did admissibility fail?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N04, "Routing theorem — why did admissibility fail?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite local type — scope audit", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite local type — scope audit"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N05, "Scope candidate — no finite local type — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N06, "Lemma — summation of local contributions", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N06, "Lemma — summation of local contributions"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N06, "Lemma — summation of local contributions"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N07, "Payload record — P_11→10: admissibility gap", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N07, "Payload record — P_11→10: admissibility gap"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N07, "Payload record — P_11→10: admissibility gap"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N08, "Localization lemma — does some connected X⊆ R have B(X)<0?", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N08, "Localization lemma — does some connected X⊆ R have B(X)<0?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N08, "Localization lemma — does some connected X⊆ R have B(X)<0?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N09, "Admission reject — additivity not certified", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N09, "Admission reject — additivity not certified"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N09, "Admission reject — additivity not certified"; must equal "audit_gate", meaning this node rejects execution unless the required admission or audit finding is present.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N10, "Lemma — P_11→10 satisfies CT10 trigger", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N10, "Lemma — P_11→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N10, "Lemma — P_11→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT11.N11, "Definition — localized deficit piece X", in CT11 (Localization); must equal "CT11.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N11, "Definition — localized deficit piece X"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N11, "Definition — localized deficit piece X"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT11.N12, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N12, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT11.N16, "Payload lemma — build P_11→14 — carried mass"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT11 (Localization); must contain exactly 19 generic node objects in source order from CT11.N01 through CT11.N19, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
